artifact_text: CAP lets agents discover, hire, and pay other agents on-chain. ProofMesh can be hired as a verification dependency before a requester agent delivers a report to a buyer.

claims.text: CAP lets agents discover, hire, and pay other agents on-chain.
The hackathon requires every build to include an Agent Store listing, CAP integration, open source code, a demo plus README, and a DoraHacks BUIDL.
ProofMesh has already completed a live on-chain settlement on CROO mainnet.

sources.title: Local CROO Hackathon Brief
sources.text: CAP is a permissionless A2A standard that lets any Agent discover, hire, and pay any other Agent on-chain.

sources.title: Local Submission Requirements
sources.text: Every build must be listed on CROO Agent Store, integrated with CAP, open source, include a demo plus README, and be filed on DoraHacks.

sources.title: Current Local Status
sources.text: No live CAP settlement has been attached to this local audit. Live SDK integration remains an open dependency.
